semanticdatatables-desc: Adds a native DataTables result format for Semantic MediaWiki queries
semanticdatatables-paramdesc-noajax: Disable DataTables ajax loading and render all rows into the page.
semanticdatatables-paramdesc-datatables-: Number of rows shown per DataTables page.
Deprecated compatibility parameter. Ajax loading is enabled by default; use noajax to disable it.
Deprecated compatibility parameter. Ajax loading is enabled by default; use noajax to disable it.
semanticdatatables-paramdesc-class: Additional CSS classes for the table.
semanticdatatables-error-missing-datatab: DataTables is not loaded. Load a DataTables ResourceLoader module before using this format.
